headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Monster Beverage, Raises Price Target to $105
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Chris Carey   maintains Monster Beverage (NASDAQ:MNST) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $97 to $105.
